title: Mollie Gustafson
compiled_truth: Mollie Gustafson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-27), Mollie Gustafson sent 59 and received 233 emails, totalling 292 interactions. Top correspondents: [Portland Desk](people/portland-desk) (23), [Center Dl-Portland](people/center-dl-portland) (21), [Jonalan Page](people/jonalan-page) (10), [Jeff Shields](people/jeff-shields) (10), [Jim Buerkle](people/jim-buerkle) (9).
